description_long: This clock tower features a tall, narrow wooden structure with a rounded top and a prominent circular clock face set into a metallic bezel. The body of the tower is finished in a dark, polished wood, with a recessed central section and three small, spherical decorative elements below the clock face. Vertical grooves and lines run down the lower portion, adding visual interest and a sense of height. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the tower's slender profile. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on verticality and minimal ornamentation.
description: A tall, slender wooden clock tower with a rounded top, metallic clock face, and minimal decorative elements. The design is elegant and vertically oriented.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular clock face, recessed central section, and three small decorative spheres below the clock.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tower's narrow, smooth profile and the curvature of the rounded top.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the clock face visible, recessed section, and vertical grooves on the lower part.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the narrow, smooth profile seen in view 1.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular with a metallic bezel, featuring a simple design with no visible numerals or markings. The hands are minimalistic and dark in color, with no additional decorative elements.
